findings.summary: DC power supply (129 components). 2 RF matching networks falsely detected (L1 ferrite EMI filter + C12 decoupling misidentified). 5 regulators correct. 10 RC filters detected but many are feedback networks not signal filters.

incorrect.description: 2 RF matching networks falsely detected - L1 ferrite bead EMI filter and C12 decoupling capacitor misidentified as RF matching
RC filter count includes feedback networks that are not signal filters

suggestions: Distinguish ferrite EMI filters from RF matching networks
Distinguish feedback networks from signal RC filters
